specializations: Skin longevity and anti-aging biotech actives
product_highlights: Comprehensive biotech active portfolio from fermentation and plant cell culture
Sustainable biotech production with low environmental impact
Global R&D network with cutting-edge biotech capabilities
notes: Swiss fragrance and cosmetic ingredient giant with a comprehensive biotechnology-derived active portfolio. Givaudan Active Beauty's biotech capabilities span fermentation, plant cell culture, and bioconversion, producing a wide range of novel actives. Strong focus on microbiome-modulating and epigenetic actives for skin longevity. Exceptional sustainability credentials and global R&D resources.
